post_s11_truth_caveat.required_s12_rule: S12 must add a command-dispatch or connector leverage path that can trigger and verify fresh main-head proof.

selected_next_mission.title: S12 — One-Accept Mission Gauntlet
selected_next_mission.purpose: Prove and harden S11 by running real bounded missions through the one-accept executor, adding a connector leverage layer for high-frequency proof/mission/repo actions, closing GitHub token/workflow/merge gaps, mirroring mission receipts safely through MCP-style resources, and proving one initial approval with zero routine midpoint approvals.

next_action: Merge compact S12 prep green, then implement S12 from docs/S12_ONE_ACCEPT_MISSION_GAUNTLET.md on build/s12-one-accept-mission-gauntlet.
do_not_reopen: S9 One-Drop Build Accelerator naming and purpose
S10 Assistant Optimization Layer naming and purpose
no prompt docs unless explicitly requested
safety_boundary: No hidden autonomy, browser-cookie/session-token automation, secrets, paid compute, production deployment, database mutation, account permission changes, private data exposure, destructive irreversible action, validator weakening, schema weakening, proof weakening, or GitHub permission bypass.
resume_prompt: Resume StealthEye Cloud from current repo state. S12 is selected as One-Accept Mission Gauntlet. If compact prep is merged, implement from docs/S12_ONE_ACCEPT_MISSION_GAUNTLET.md on build/s12-one-accept-mission-gauntlet.
